heroTitle: Before content, before followers, before any of it — you need to know exactly who you are and who you are talking to.
heroDesc: Brand strategy is not a logo. It is the foundation that makes everything else work.
problemHeading: What happens when the foundation is missing.
problemBody:
When your brand is unclear, your content is unclear. When your content is unclear, your ideal clients do not feel like you are talking to them. When they do not feel seen, they scroll past.

Most LinkedIn struggles are not content problems. They are brand problems. The positioning is vague. The message is too broad. The story does not connect to the right person.

mainItems.title: Your Positioning Statement
mainItems.body: A clear, simple sentence that tells anyone exactly who you help, what problem you solve, and what makes you different. This goes everywhere — your headline, your about section, your content, your pitch.

mainItems.title: Your Brand Story
mainItems.body: The real story of how you got here and why you do this work. Written in plain language that connects with people and builds trust before they even speak to you.

mainItems.title: Your Unique Mechanism
mainItems.body: The named system or framework that separates you from everyone else offering similar services. Something your ideal client can understand in ten seconds and remember forever.

mainItems.title: Your Audience Definition
mainItems.body: Not a vague description of your target market. A specific, detailed picture of the exact person you are trying to reach — what they struggle with, what they want, and how they make decisions.

ctaHeadline: Everything starts with clarity. Let's build yours.
ctaSubtext: Book a free 30-minute call and we will figure out exactly what your brand needs to start working.
